planningRationale: Single Agent Task decomposition. Story FORGE-102 produces three co-located artifacts (article-hero.js, article-hero.css, article-hero.test.js) that are tightly coupled — the JS defines the DOM structure that CSS styles and tests verify. The Story's Agent Notes explicitly state 'Single Agent Task — block + tests co-located.' Medium complexity (2-4 hours): dynamic metadata consumption via getMetadata(), two variants (with/without image), responsive behavior, and date parsing logic. No parallelism needed — single task covers the full block.
stopProtocolFindings: STOP Protocol executed. Searched: (1) blocks/ directory — found blocks/hero/ with CSS only, confirmed it is the EDS boilerplate hero (background image + h1 overlay), NOT the article-hero which has metadata consumption, category badges, and date formatting. Cannot extend. (2) scripts/aem.js — confirmed getMetadata() exported at line 299 and createOptimizedPicture() at line 315. Both available for import. (3) scripts/scripts.js — does not export getMetadata(); block must import from aem.js directly. (4) No existing blocks/article-hero/ directory. Conclusion: new block required, leveraging existing aem.js utilities.
dependencyAnalysis: Story-level dependency on Story 0 (global design tokens in styles.css, scripts.js utilities). The current styles.css uses boilerplate token values (roboto fonts, different colors), not Splunk-specific tokens. The article-hero CSS references token variable names (--button-color, --heading-color, etc.) which will resolve to correct values once Story 0 updates styles.css. The block is code-complete independently — token resolution is a deployment-time concern managed by the orchestrator's Story sequencing, not the task DAG.
riskAssessment: Low overall risk. (1) LCP performance: mitigated by mandatory loading='eager' on hero image and use of createOptimizedPicture(). (2) Date parsing: raw metadata 'March 23, 2026' must be parsed and reformatted; edge cases (missing date, malformed date) mitigated by graceful degradation requirement (AC-9). (3) Token dependency: styles.css currently has boilerplate values; visual fidelity depends on Story 0 completion, but code correctness is independent.
